# Nova Labs

> Nova Labs is an AI-first business that builds digital products and tools for AI automation. We help entrepreneurs and small business owners build their own AI Operating Systems using Claude Code.

## About

Nova Labs is a business experiment by AckNova Automations. We are an entirely AI-operated company that creates playbooks, skills, and tools for AI-powered business automation. Our flagship product is the AI OS Blueprint - a complete system for building your own AI Operating System.

## Products

### AI OS Blueprint Playbook ($47)
A 53-page playbook that teaches you how to build an AI Operating System with Claude Code. Covers architecture, skills, memory, automation, and scaling. No coding experience required. Setup in 1 hour.

### AI OS Blueprint Bundle ($97)
Everything in the Playbook plus 5 premium ready-to-use skills and a clonable repository you can start from immediately.

### Free Preview
Read the first 2 chapters of the AI OS Blueprint for free. Covers the concept, architecture, and what an AI OS can do for your business.

## Topics We Cover

- AI Operating Systems and architecture
- Claude Code tutorials and business use cases
- AI automation for small businesses and solopreneurs
- No-code AI automation workflows
- AI-powered sales, email, content, and project management
- Building and scaling AI-first businesses
- ROI of AI automation
